title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report January 09 2024
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report January 09 2024
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report January 09 2024
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 09/01/2024
DCE iron ore futures fall today by 0.25%. the main contract I2405 closed 994. Traders ship according to marketconditions; Some steel mills tended to be wait-and-see, and purchased on demand.
